title: Chinese Steel Stockpiles Now Up On A Year On Year Basis
section_path: Chinese Steel Stockpiles Now Up On A Year On Year Basis
section_path_text: Chinese Steel Stockpiles Now Up On A Year On Year Basis
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, stockpiles of flat and construction steel products at warehouses in major cities in China have now climbed to approximately 18.2 million tons. This is 600,000 tons (3%) more than was stockpiled a week ago and is up year-on-year by 1.1 million tons (6%). Overall, stockpiles continue to rise and are finally up on a year-on-year basis.
